name: BB:CategoryDefinition: UAC Bypass Registry Key
notes:
This Building Block defines registry keys known to allow UAC bypassing.

Specifically, the following key suspicious key fragments are defined:

UAC Bypass via fodhelper.exe or computerdefaults.exe
- "\ms-settings\shell\open\command"
- "\ms-settings\CurVer"
- "\ms-settings\URL Protocol"

UAC Bypass via sdclt.exe
- "\folder\shell\open\command"
- "\folder\CurVer"
- "\folder\URL Protocol"

UAC Bypass via slui.exe or changepk.exe
- "\Launcher.SystemSettings\shell\open\command"
- "\Launcher.SystemSettings\CurVer"
- "\Launcher.SystemSettings\URL Protocol"

UAC Bypass via wsreset.exe
- "\ms-windows-store\URL Protocol"
- "\AppX82a6gwre4fdg3bt635tn5ctqjf8msdd2\shell\open\command"

UAC Bypass via Environment Variable Manipulation
- "\environment\windir"
- "\environment\COR_PROFILER_PATH"

UAC Bypass via Elevated IColorDataProxy interface
- "Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\ICM\Calibration\DisplayCalibrator"
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: UAC Bypass Registry Key on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

when the event matches LOWER(CONCAT("Registry Key", '\', "Registry Value Name")) MATCHES '.*\\((folder|ms-settings|launcher.systemsettings|ms-windows-store|appx82a6gwre4fdg3bt635tn5ctqjf8msdd2)\\(shell\\open\\command|curver|url protocol)|environment\\(windir|cor_profiler)|microsoft\\windows nt\\currentversion\\icm\\calibration\\displaycalibrator).*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: UAC Bypass Registry Key on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification

AND when the event matches LOWER(CONCAT("Registry Key", '\', "Registry Value Name")) MATCHES '.*\\((folder|ms-settings|launcher.systemsettings|ms-windows-store|appx82a6gwre4fdg3bt635tn5ctqjf8msdd2)\\(shell\\open\\command|curver|url protocol)|environment\\(windir|cor_profiler)|microsoft\\windows nt\\currentversion\\icm\\calibration\\displaycalibrator).*' AQL filter query
